arts.ttl: Preview: AZ Alkmaar vs. Willem II - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Eredivisie clash between AZ Alkmaar and Willem II, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

AZ sit in sixth place on 17 points after 11 matches. They were defeated 3-2 in their last Eredivisie match against Feyenoord, extending their winless streak to five. Willem II slumped 1-0 against Twe...
